data.content: Implementation complete on branch `worktree-foolery-7e78-setlist-pagination` at commit `263d94ea`. Added 12-step Setlist pagination, anchored the default page to the first unfinished beat, and kept earlier completed pages available via left navigation. Validation passed: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
